Class DeviceInformationTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jUser.model.DeviceInformationTBL
@Entity public class DeviceInformationTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing device information in the database.

This class maps to the device_information table and stores information about devices used by users, including device name, unique key, location, and last connection time.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - User who owns this device
  • devicename - Name of the device
  • devicekey - Unique key identifying the device
  • location - Geographic location of the device
  • active - Active status of the device
